title: Intense Green Irish Savoiardi-Ladyfingers Trifle
description: A festive and umami-rich dessert that combines the best of Irish cuisine with Eastern flavors.

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Irish honey or other floral honey

instructions: Make the tadka by heating 1/4 cup of sesame seeds in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly, until fragrant and slightly browned.
Cool the tadka completely and store it in an airtight container.
Bake the savoiardi ladyfingers for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted and dry.
In a blender or food processor, puree the kale stems, shiitake mushrooms, green tea, and matcha powder until smooth.
Fold the green tea mixture into the whipped cream until well combined.
Dip each ladyfinger into the green tea mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Assemble the trifle by layering the ladyfingers, tadka, and green tea mixture in a large serving dish.
Drizzle the honey over the top layer of the trifle and sprinkle with sea salt, if using.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves and serve immediately.
